dashboard.title: Epic-26: Local Write Path (M0+M1)
dashboard.description: Monitors write-tool performance, M1 driver success rates, and strictly-local enforcement

panels.title: M1 Driver Run Duration
panels.description: Wall-clock time per RED-GREEN run. Target: < 300,000ms

panels.title: Write Tool Latency
panels.description: Per-invocation latency for write-tool lane scripts on files under 10KB

panels.title: M1 Success Rate (4/5 target)
panels.description: Percentage of M1 runs that complete RED-GREEN successfully. Target: >= 80%

panels.title: Metrics JSONL Entries per Run
panels.description: Number of entries written to local-llm-metrics.jsonl per M1 run. Must be >= 1

panels.title: Structured Failure Records
panels.description: Count of structured JSON failure records. Non-zero on failed runs confirms OBS-002

panels.title: Cloud Model ID Violations
panels.description: Count of Claude/Anthropic model IDs found in metrics. Must always be 0

panels.title: E2E Test Duration
panels.description: Total e2e test wall-clock time. Hard timeout at 600,000ms
